---
title: "Mapping the Data"
author: "Khanh Do"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
library(patchwork)
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
```

# Read in Data

```{r}
# Read county data
url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/khanhdo05/sta-310-final/main/data/clean/FINAL_DATA.csv"
df <- read_csv(url, show_col_types = FALSE)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    FIPS = as.character(FIPS)
    )

# Read residuals
residuals_df <- read_csv(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/khanhdo05/sta-310-final/main/data/clean/model_residuals.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(FIPS = as.character(FIPS))

# Load county shapefile
counties_sf <- counties(cb = TRUE, year = 2020) %>%
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(as.numeric(GEOID)))  # match your FIPS format
```

# Process Data

```{r}
# ---------- COUNTY DATA ----------
# Join your data
map_sf <- counties_sf %>%
  left_join(df, by = c("GEOID" = "FIPS"))

# ---------- RESIDS DATA ----------
# Join to map
map_sf_resid <- counties_sf %>%
  left_join(residuals_df, by = c("GEOID" = "FIPS"))

# Shared scale so both maps are visually comparable
resid_limit <- max(abs(c(residuals_df$residual_R, 
                          residuals_df$residual_F)), 
                    na.rm = TRUE)
```

# Fill Map with Data

```{r}
# Map 1: Democratic Vote Share
ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = PresDemRatio), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "red", mid = "white", high = "blue",
    midpoint = 0.5, na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  labs(title = "County-Level Democratic Vote Share, 2020",
       fill = "PresDemRatio") +
  theme_void()
```


```{r}
# Map 2: Distress markers
map_UnemploymentRate2020 <- ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = UnemploymentRate2020), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "UnemploymentRate by County",
       fill = "%") +
  theme_void()

map_PropUnemplComp <- ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = PropUnemplComp), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "PropUnemplComp by County",
       fill = "Proportion") +
  theme_void()

map_UnemploymentRate2020 + map_PropUnemplComp

map_eic <- ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = PropEICAmount), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "EIC Intensity by County",
       fill = "Proportion") +
  theme_void()

map_child <- ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = PropChildTax), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "Child Tax Credit Intensity by County",
       fill = "Proportion") +
  theme_void()

map_eic + map_child

ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = SeniorBurden), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "Senior Burden by County",
       fill = "Ratio (1:n)") +
  theme_void()

map_soc <- ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = PropSocSec), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "Social Security Reliance by County",
       fill = "Proportion") +
  theme_void()

map_pen <- ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = PropPensions), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "Pensions Reliance by County",
       fill = "Proportion") +
  theme_void()

map_soc + map_pen
```


```{r}
# Map 3: Reduced Model Residuals
map_R <- ggplot(map_sf_resid) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = residual_R), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "red", mid = "white", high = "blue",
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-resid_limit, resid_limit),
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Reduced Model Residuals",
    fill = "Residual"
  ) +
  theme_void()

# Map 4: Full Model Residuals  
map_F <- ggplot(map_sf_resid) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = residual_F), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-125, -66), ylim = c(25, 50), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "red", mid = "white", high = "blue",
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-resid_limit, resid_limit),
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Full Model Residuals",
    fill = "Residual"
  ) +
  theme_void()

# Display side by side
map_R + map_F +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Residual Maps: Reduced vs. Full Model",
    subtitle = "Blue = underpredicted Democratic support,       Red = overpredicted"
  )
```
